entity.summary: Arbitrum decentralized perpetual-contract exchange using an index-based price-feed model, with current locked value, fee generation, and substantial cumulative derivatives volume.
entity.notes: Current protocol data reports non-zero Arbitrum TVL, annualized fees, cumulative fees, and roughly $40 million in cumulative perpetual volume. The project domain remains reachable but the trading interface was not independently rendered in this review pass, so the URL is live_unverified. Current value and fee activity support an active classification.
